Faith in Action

Our Services & History

Faith in action — decades of compassionate care for Central Visayas. Explore our timeline of milestones and the full range of services we offer.

Our Journey

Medical & Service History

From our founding in 1992 to today's community health missions — a journey of faith, compassion, and service.

Founding

PhilCHAN Founded Nationally

The Philippine Catholic HIV/AIDS Network (PhilCHAN) was established by the Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines — Episcopal Commission on Healthcare (CBCP-ECHC) as a Church-based response to the growing HIV/AIDS epidemic.

1992
1992 · Founding

PhilCHAN Founded Nationally

The Philippine Catholic HIV/AIDS Network (PhilCHAN) was established by the Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines — Episcopal Commission on Healthcare (CBCP-ECHC) as a Church-based response to the growing HIV/AIDS epidemic.

Chapter

Cebu Chapter Established

PhilCHAN Cebu chapter was established under Dr. Greta Canoy as Coordinator, providing counseling, support, and HIV advocacy from its base at Tigbao, Talamban, Cebu City.

2018
2018 · Chapter

Cebu Chapter Established

PhilCHAN Cebu chapter was established under Dr. Greta Canoy as Coordinator, providing counseling, support, and HIV advocacy from its base at Tigbao, Talamban, Cebu City.

Chapter

Community HIV Testing Center Opens

A community-based HIV testing center officially opened in Cebu City on April 27, offering free and confidential testing in a faith-based, compassionate environment.

2019
2019 · Chapter

Community HIV Testing Center Opens

A community-based HIV testing center officially opened in Cebu City on April 27, offering free and confidential testing in a faith-based, compassionate environment.

Program

COVID-19 Response & Continuity

Despite the pandemic, PhilCHAN Cebu continued HIV testing and counseling services, expanding telehealth support to ensure uninterrupted care for the community.

2020
2020 · Program

COVID-19 Response & Continuity

Despite the pandemic, PhilCHAN Cebu continued HIV testing and counseling services, expanding telehealth support to ensure uninterrupted care for the community.

Chapter

Mt. Zion Center Established

PhilCHAN Cebu established its permanent community center at Mt. Zion Center, Tigbao, Talamban, becoming a dedicated hub for free HIV testing and pastoral care in Central Visayas.

2020
2020 · Chapter

Mt. Zion Center Established

PhilCHAN Cebu established its permanent community center at Mt. Zion Center, Tigbao, Talamban, becoming a dedicated hub for free HIV testing and pastoral care in Central Visayas.

Program

Free Testing & Community Education

Regular free HIV testing services were launched every Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM, alongside community education programs to raise awareness and reduce stigma.

2023
2023 · Program

Free Testing & Community Education

Regular free HIV testing services were launched every Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM, alongside community education programs to raise awareness and reduce stigma.

Partnership

Partnership with Cebu City Health

PhilCHAN Cebu partnered with the Cebu City Health Social Hygiene Clinic for the International AIDS Candlelight Memorial, strengthening collaboration between faith-based and government health services.

2023
2023 · Partnership

Partnership with Cebu City Health

PhilCHAN Cebu partnered with the Cebu City Health Social Hygiene Clinic for the International AIDS Candlelight Memorial, strengthening collaboration between faith-based and government health services.

Outreach

First HIV AIDS Lay Forum

The first HIV AIDS Lay Forum was conducted at Barangay Concepcion on November 29, bringing HIV education and awareness directly to the community level.

2024
2024 · Outreach

First HIV AIDS Lay Forum

The first HIV AIDS Lay Forum was conducted at Barangay Concepcion on November 29, bringing HIV education and awareness directly to the community level.

Outreach

School HIV Lecture Series

PhilCHAN Cebu organized informative online HIV lectures targeting USC students via Zoom, and expanded school-based education programs across Cebu.

2024
2024 · Outreach

School HIV Lecture Series

PhilCHAN Cebu organized informative online HIV lectures targeting USC students via Zoom, and expanded school-based education programs across Cebu.

Outreach

Mobile Medical Missions

PhilCHAN Cebu launched mobile medical missions offering medical consultations, medicine distribution, health education, and spiritual care to underserved communities.

2025
2025 · Outreach

Mobile Medical Missions

PhilCHAN Cebu launched mobile medical missions offering medical consultations, medicine distribution, health education, and spiritual care to underserved communities.

Program

Advent Recollection & World AIDS Day

A meaningful Advent Recollection was held on December 3 in observance of World AIDS Day, combining faith reflection with HIV awareness and community solidarity.

2025
2025 · Program

Advent Recollection & World AIDS Day

A meaningful Advent Recollection was held on December 3 in observance of World AIDS Day, combining faith reflection with HIV awareness and community solidarity.

Partnership

MHRP Stakeholder Invitation

PhilCHAN Cebu was invited to the U.S. Military HIV Research Program (MHRP) RV670 Stakeholder Meeting, recognizing its role as a key community partner in HIV research and prevention.

2025
2025 · Partnership

MHRP Stakeholder Invitation

PhilCHAN Cebu was invited to the U.S. Military HIV Research Program (MHRP) RV670 Stakeholder Meeting, recognizing its role as a key community partner in HIV research and prevention.

Partnership

Cebu Caritas Collaboration

A formal collaboration with Cebu Caritas Inc. expanded services to include free clinic operations, medical missions, First Aid & CPR training, TB program, and IDU Care Drop-in Center.

2025
2025 · Partnership

Cebu Caritas Collaboration

A formal collaboration with Cebu Caritas Inc. expanded services to include free clinic operations, medical missions, First Aid & CPR training, TB program, and IDU Care Drop-in Center.

Partnership

ASOG Strategic Consultation

PhilCHAN Cebu participated in the Ateneo School of Government (ASOG) Strategic Religious Engagement consultation, advancing faith-driven development in Central Visayas.

2025
2025 · Partnership

ASOG Strategic Consultation

PhilCHAN Cebu participated in the Ateneo School of Government (ASOG) Strategic Religious Engagement consultation, advancing faith-driven development in Central Visayas.

Outreach

Barangay Outreach Program

Regular barangay-level outreach events bring free HIV testing and education to communities across Cebu, including events at Barangay Kalunasan and other partner barangays.

Ongoing
Ongoing · Outreach

Barangay Outreach Program

Regular barangay-level outreach events bring free HIV testing and education to communities across Cebu, including events at Barangay Kalunasan and other partner barangays.

Program

Free HIV Testing Every Week

Free and confidential HIV testing is available every Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM, at the PhilCHAN Community Center, Mt. Zion Center, Tigbao, Talamban, Cebu City.

Ongoing
Ongoing · Program

Free HIV Testing Every Week

Free and confidential HIV testing is available every Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM, at the PhilCHAN Community Center, Mt. Zion Center, Tigbao, Talamban, Cebu City.

What We Offer

Our Full Range of Services

From free rapid testing to community outreach, each service is rooted in compassion, dignity, and professional care.

Confidential HIV Testing

Since 2019

Rapid, safe, and completely free testing conducted with the highest standards of privacy and clinical accuracy by professional medical staff.

Pastoral Care & Counseling

Since 2018

Faith-based emotional and spiritual support tailored to your journey, provided in a welcoming, non-judgmental space by trained pastoral counselors.

Medical Navigation

Since 2018

Professional guidance through healthcare systems, including assistance with treatment access, referrals, and ongoing care coordination with partner institutions.

Community Education & Outreach

Since 2023

Barangay-level lay forums, school HIV lectures, workplace awareness sessions, and mobile education programs designed to break down stigma.

Mobile Medical Missions

Since 2025

Medical consultations, medicine distribution, health education, and spiritual care brought directly to underserved communities across Cebu.

Partnership Events

Since 2023

Collaborations with Cebu City Health, MHRP, LoveYourself, Cebu Caritas, and ASOG Ateneo to expand HIV prevention, research, and care networks.

Visit Our Center

Need Support or Information?

Our medical and pastoral care team is available for free, confidential HIV testing, counseling, and guidance. No appointment needed — just walk in during clinic hours.

Visit Our Center

PhilCHAN Cebu

Philippine Catholic HIV/AIDS Network Inc. - Cebu Chapter. Providing free, dignified, and confidential health services to our community.
